meta.title: Simple USB Signage – USB Photo & Video Signage for Android TV
meta.description: Simple USB Signage is an Android TV app for playing photos, videos, and optional background music from a USB drive as continuous digital signage.
meta.keywords: Simple USB Signage, Android TV signage app, USB signage Android TV, digital signage for TV, USB slideshow TV, photo video signage, Android TV media player, TV signage player, USB media signage, local signage app, offline signage TV, Fire TV signage, Google TV signage, image video slideshow TV, background music signage, simple digital signage
meta.author: Deepak PK

og.title: Simple USB Signage for Android TV
og.description: Turn an Android TV or Fire TV into a simple USB-powered signage screen for photos, videos, and optional background audio.

twitter.title: Simple USB Signage for Android TV
twitter.description: A simple Android TV signage app that plays photos, videos, and background music directly from USB storage.

product.name: Simple USB Signage
product.heroTitle: Simple USB Signage – USB Digital Signage for Android TV
product.heroDescription: Turn your Android TV, Google TV, or Fire TV into a simple signage player. Connect a USB drive with photos, videos, and optional audio files, then play a continuous full-screen signage loop using a remote-friendly interface.

features.title: Features Built for Simple USB Signage

cards.title: Made for Android TV
bullets: Leanback-style interface designed for TV screens and remote controls
Works on Android TV, Google TV, and Fire TV devices
Clear menu options for Play, Reload Files, Settings, Help, and Subscription
Large, readable media cards with filename labels and thumbnails

cards.title: USB Media Scanning
bullets: Detects USB mass-storage devices when the app launches
Handles USB attach and detach events while the app is running
Requests USB permission and retries initialization with timeout handling
Recursively scans folders and subfolders to build one flat media list

cards.title: Photos & Video Signage
bullets: Plays image and video files together in a continuous signage loop
Starts playback from a selected visual item or from the Play menu
Uses smooth crossfade transitions between visual items
Loops the visual playlist continuously for unattended display

cards.title: Background Audio
bullets: Builds a separate playlist for optional background audio files
Loops background music independently from photo and video playback
Can mute video audio and continue background music
Can enable video audio and automatically pause background music during videos

cards.title: Display Controls
bullets: Choose black or white signage background color
Set images to Fill screen for edge-to-edge signage
Set images to Show full image to avoid cropping
Increase or decrease image slide duration from settings

cards.title: Media Library Tools
bullets: Filters hidden files and unsupported extensions from the visible list
Shows image thumbnails and type artwork for video, audio, and unknown files
Long-press OK to view file details
File details include type, size/path information, open, and delete actions

cards.title: Direct USB Streaming
bullets: Uses an internal localhost media server for USB-hosted media
Streams videos, audio, and images without first copying them to app storage
Designed for simple local signage workflows
Reload/rescan USB media anytime from the main menu

cards.title: Free Demo & Subscription
bullets: Free/demo mode unlocks a limited number of media files for testing
Locked media items are blurred and marked with a lock badge
Unsubscribed playback shows a subtle Demo Version watermark
Includes subscription and subscription management screens

cards.title: Localized Experience
bullets: Includes localized strings for 16 languages
Supports English, Arabic, Chinese, French, German, Hindi, and more
Help, FAQ, About, Support, Privacy Policy, and Terms open inside the app
In-app browser includes progress, retry, and failure handling

cards.title: Device & Settings Info
bullets: Shows screen resolution and calculated aspect ratio
Settings layout adapts to different screen sizes
Subscription status is cached for an offline grace period after verification
Store-specific builds support Google Play, Amazon Appstore, and Huawei AppGallery billing

items.title: Shops & Small Businesses
items.text: Run simple promotional screens, offers, product photos, and short videos from a USB drive without a cloud signage system.

items.title: Food Stalls & Cafes
items.text: Display menus, combo offers, food photos, and looping videos on a TV using local USB media.

items.title: Events & Parties
items.text: Play birthday slides, welcome screens, event photos, sponsor videos, and background music on a TV.

items.title: Clubs & Auditoriums
items.text: Use a TV as a simple media signage screen for announcements, schedules, event promotions, and waiting-area displays.

items.q: What is Simple USB Signage?
items.a: Simple USB Signage is an Android TV app that plays photos, videos, and optional background audio from a connected USB drive as continuous digital signage.

items.q: Do I need an internet connection to use the signage playback?
items.a: No. The main signage workflow is USB-based, so your photos, videos, and audio files can play locally from the connected USB drive.

items.q: Does the app scan folders and subfolders?
items.a: Yes. The app recursively scans folders and subfolders on connected USB drives and builds a flat media list for playback.

items.q: What media can I use for signage?
items.a: The app supports common image, video, and audio formats. Images and videos are used for the visual signage playlist, while audio files can be used as optional background music.

items.q: Can photos and videos play in the same signage loop?
items.a: Yes. The app supports mixed image and video playback in the same continuous signage session.

items.q: Can I control how images fit on the TV screen?
items.a: Yes. You can choose Fill screen for edge-to-edge display or Show full image to avoid cropping when the image aspect ratio does not match the TV.

items.q: Can I change the image slide duration?
items.a: Yes. The image slide duration can be increased or decreased from the settings screen.

items.q: How does background music work?
items.a: Audio files are played as a separate looping background playlist. You can also decide whether videos should play their own audio or stay muted while background audio continues.

items.q: What happens in demo/free mode?
items.a: Free/demo mode limits the number of unlocked audio, video, and image files shown in the media set. Locked items are blurred and show a lock badge, and demo playback shows a subtle watermark.

items.q: Can I delete files from the app?
items.a: Yes. Long-press OK on a media item to open the details dialog, where supported actions such as open and delete are available.

video.title: See Simple USB Signage on Android TV
video.iframeTitle: Simple USB Signage Android TV Demo

steps.title: Prepare a USB Drive
steps.text: Copy your signage photos, videos, and optional audio files to a FAT32 USB drive. You can organize files inside folders and subfolders.

steps.title: Connect USB to TV
steps.text: Open Simple USB Signage on your Android TV, Google TV, or Fire TV, allow USB permission, and let the app scan supported media files.

steps.title: Press Play
steps.text: Start signage playback from the Play menu or from a selected visual item. The app loops photos and videos continuously with optional background music.

features.title: Why TV Users Will Like It

cards.title: USB-First Signage
bullets: Scan media directly from USB storage
Reload/rescan connected USB media whenever needed

cards.title: Photo + Video Loop
bullets: Play images and videos in one continuous signage session
Automatic image slide timing with smooth crossfade transitions

cards.title: Flexible Audio
bullets: Loop optional background audio independently
Choose whether videos play their own audio or stay muted

cards.title: Simple TV Settings
bullets: Choose black or white background
Set image display mode to Fill screen or Show full image
